title: Global Steel Contraction Continues
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global crude steel production totaled 169.5 million tons in May. This is up month-on-month by 6.8 million tons (4%) but is 4.9 million tons (-3%) less than was reported last year for May's production. Global crude steel production has now contracted on a year-on-year basis for nine straight months.
